component.name: MirrorItem
component.script: sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.host = m.top.findNode("host") m.qual = m.top.findNode("qual") m.badge = m.top.findNode("badge") m.badgeBg = m.top.findNode("badgeBg") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.title.text = c.title m.host.text = c.shortDescriptionLine1 m.qual.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 isPremium = c.releaseDate = "premium" m.badge.text = "PRO" m.badge.visible = isPremium m.badgeBg.visible = isPremium end sub sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.bg.color = "0xff2424ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" else m.bg.color = "0x141414ff" m.title.color = "0xeeeeeeff" end if end sub
